title: Allow typing French numbers with coma instead of point
excerpt:
When we enter data in the Numbers columns of the French version, even if it shows the decimals with a coma, we can’t actually type them with a coma when entering data. 
E.g. My number keyboard would enter: 250,99 but the…

posts.author: jimmylavoie (Jimmy Lavoie)
posts.cookedHtml:
When we enter data in the Numbers columns of the French version, even if it shows the decimals with a coma, we can’t actually type them with a coma when entering data.

E.g. My number keyboard would enter: 250,99 but the column won’t allow the coma, so I need to type 250.99 – then the column would show 250,99. So it slowing down the data entry.

posts.author: Joachim (Dessus)
posts.cookedHtml: We have the similar issue, we can’t use the decimal separator of the french keypad. We have to replace it with the “,” of the alpha part of the keyboard to type a number with decimal.
